items.notes: 2-stroke boxer piston UAV engines with EFI, ranging 58cc–1000cc, 11–82HP

evidence.snippet:
### [101HS ENGINE](https://www.zanzotteraengines.com/engines/101hs-engine-2/ "101HS ENGINE")
11HP boxer UAV engine with electronic injection 1.5KW brushless starter generator

### [996HS Engine](https://www.zanzotteraengines.com/engines/996hs-engine/ "996HS Engine")
82hp boxer uav engine with electronic injection 150A brushless starter generator

items.notes: All engines include integrated brushless starter-generators (1.5kW–150A), providing on-board power generation

evidence.snippet:
Zanzottera Technologies S.r.l.
------------------------------
Via Italia, 105/107
22010 Grandola ed Uniti (Como)
Italy

Our Company is dedicated to the design, the development and the production of a range of high quality,
light weight engines, for powering Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV).
Zanzottera Technologies srl DOES NOT supply engines for powering manned aircraft.

Zanzottera designs and manufactures UAV engines ranging from 58 cc to 1000 cc. All models feature EFI, air cooling, and support both MOGAS and AVGAS, with dedicated heavy-fuel variants for selected platforms. These engines have accumulated long-term operational experience worldwide, across diverse missions and environmental conditions.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures UAV piston engines (components); no complete platforms. Explicitly states it does NOT supply engines for manned aircraft.

products.notes: Six named engine SKUs listed on homepage; individual product pages were skipped in mirror. A seventh product (Z58) appears in news links but page was not fetched.

evidence.snippet: Design, development and production of piston engines for the propulsion of small and medium sized UAVs

Zanzottera designs and manufactures UAV engines ranging from 58 cc to 1000 cc. All models feature EFI, air cooling, and support both MOGAS and AVGAS, with dedicated heavy-fuel variants for selected platforms. These engines have accumulated long-term operational experience worldwide, across diverse missions and environmental conditions.
This experience directly informs design decisions, material selection, operating margins, and derating strategies.
> Zanzottera Technologies Srl has certified its own Quality Management System .

readiness.notes: Catalog SKUs with specific HP ratings; ISO 9001 certified quality management system; explicitly describes 'design, development and production'; engines have 'long-term operational experience worldwide'

fetch_requests.source_hint: crawl_index status=skipped_class_budget, linked from resource-0006 line 81

tagline: Italian piston-engine supplier producing six boxer two-stroke UAV engines (11–82 HP) with electronic fuel injection and integrated brushless starter-generators, ranging from the 101HS to the high-capacity 996GRX with in-flight recharge capability. ISO 9001 certified and in production. NDAA and Blue UAS compliance status not publicly disclosed; U.S. contract history or integration into allied platforms not evident in available sources.
